statement: In every magma, Equation 3125 (`x = (((y * x) * z) * x) * w`) implies Equation 583 (`x = y * (z * (z * (w * x)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0278
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y x) z) x) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op z (op w x))))
